features: displays PasarGuard lifetime_used_traffic, matching the cumulative value on the manager card
keeps billing on the current used_traffic counter so reset history is not charged twice
reconstructs cumulative display usage from reseted_usage plus used_traffic on older responses
uses the official /api/admins ids filter instead of unsupported GET /api/admin/by-id
uses exact username fallback before bounded page scanning
keeps live usage, menu layout management and all prior reseller features
does not change the database schema and excludes README files

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload ZIP through the central bot
required_bindings: Core: PASARGUARD_DB, EDGE_WORKER, PROCESSOR_WORKER and LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR

validation.worker_syntax: passed: node --check for core, edge and processor
validation.usage_parser: passed: lifetime, reset reconstruction, nested response and missing-field cases
validation.billing_reset_safety: passed: display-only lifetime change creates no charge; current-counter delta bills once; reset bills zero
validation.pasarguard_api: official /api/admins ids filter and AdminDetails response fields reviewed
validation.zip_integrity: passed: clean archive structure and unzip CRC validation
validation.live_api: not run; requires production PasarGuard, Cloudflare and Telegram credentials

limitations: Production verification requires deployment because the real PasarGuard counter and Cloudflare bindings are unavailable offline.
The displayed value can lag until PasarGuard commits its latest node traffic to the admin counter.
title: هماهنگ‌سازی دقیق مصرف تجمیعی
summary: BluePanel مقدار تجمیعی کارت PasarGuard را نمایش می‌دهد، اما صورتحساب را فقط بر اساس مصرف دوره جاری محاسبه می‌کند تا هزینه دوباره کسر نشود.
changes: حذف GET نامعتبر by-id و استفاده از فیلتر رسمی ids.
